items.headline: RBI maintains repo rate at 5.25%, revises FY27 GDP forecast downwards
items.summary: The RBI's MPC unanimously decided to keep the policy repo rate unchanged at 5.25% due to global uncertainties, maintaining a neutral stance. The real GDP growth forecast for FY27 was revised down to 6.6% from 6.9%.

items.headline: Retail inflation hits 16-month high at 3.9% in May, WPI also rises
items.summary: Retail inflation, measured by CPI, increased to 3.9% in May 2026, driven by higher food prices. Wholesale Price Inflation (WPI) also rose to 9.68%. Economists expect further increases in inflation.

items.headline: India-UK Free Trade Agreement effective July 15, merchandise exports show strong growth
items.summary: India and the UK set July 15, 2026, as the effective date for their FTA. Indian merchandise exports grew by approximately 15% year-on-year from April 1 to June 14, 2026.

items.headline: Supportive global signals aid Indian markets; crude oil drops below $80
items.summary: Easing US-Iran tensions, a decline in crude oil prices below $80 per barrel, and a stronger Indian rupee have improved investor confidence, supporting the domestic market.

items.headline: Nifty IT, Oil & Gas, and Consumer Durables sectors lead gains; Chemicals underperform
items.summary: On Monday, Nifty IT sector rose over 1%, with Nifty Oil & Gas and Nifty Consumer Durables also performing strongly. The Nifty Chemical sector was the primary underperformer.

items.headline: Power sector regains momentum, emerges as best-performing sectoral index in 2026
items.summary: The BSE Power Index has been the top-performing sectoral index in 2026, driven by a revival in electricity demand and a multi-year investment cycle. Defense and energy stocks are also expected to remain in focus.

items.headline: Jio Platforms files IPO draft papers, eyes record ₹37,700 crore fundraising
items.summary: Jio Platforms, a subsidiary of Reliance Industries, filed draft papers for an IPO with SEBI, aiming to raise approximately ₹37,700 crore through a fresh issue of 27 crore equity shares, potentially India's biggest IPO.

items.headline: Sun Pharmaceutical acquires Innovcare Lifesciences for ₹271.2 crore
items.summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries announced the complete acquisition of Innovcare Lifesciences Private Ltd for about ₹271.2 crore (approx. $28.73 million).

items.headline: Dalmia Bharat plans to raise ₹4,000 crore for capacity expansion
items.summary: Dalmia Bharat intends to raise up to ₹4,000 crore through various instruments to support its growth strategy, aiming to expand its manufacturing capacity to 110-130 million tonnes per annum by FY31.

items.headline: Tata Motors CV secures order for over 3,400 electric commercial vehicles
items.summary: Tata Motors Commercial Vehicles received a significant order for more than 3,400 electric commercial vehicles across multiple segments, advancing electric mobility adoption in India.

items.headline: Bharat Forge secures ₹425 crore Ministry of Defence contract
items.summary: Bharat Forge Ltd has won a ₹425 crore contract from the Ministry of Defence for the supply of Gas Turbine Generators for the Indian Navy's Kolkata-class warships.

items.headline: Key companies to trade ex-dividend this week; DMR, Panasonic Carbon, Sangam India today
items.summary: A total of 36 companies, including Hindustan Unilever, Tata Power, LIC, Asian Paints, and IndusInd Bank, are scheduled to trade ex-date for dividends and other corporate actions between June 22-27. DMR Engineering, Panasonic Carbon India, and Sangam India trade ex-dividend on June 22.

items.headline: Reliance Industries rallies 3% on AGM news and Jio IPO approval
items.summary: Reliance Industries shares saw an intra-day rally of up to 3% following its 49th Annual General Meeting and the official approval for the Jio Platforms IPO.

items.headline: Oil-linked stocks in focus as crude prices remain below $80; ONGC shifts focus to 'gas-and-oil'
items.summary: ONGC, Oil India, and OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL are under investor scrutiny amid volatile but sub-$80 crude oil prices. ONGC's chairman signaled a strategic reorientation to a 'gas-and-oil' company.

items.headline: Sun Pharma and Dalmia Bharat in focus post acquisition and fundraising announcements
items.summary: Sun Pharma and Dalmia Bharat stocks are drawing investor attention following Sun Pharma's acquisition of Innovcare Lifesciences and Dalmia Bharat's plans to raise ₹4,000 crore for expansion.

items.headline: Cipla, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra among top Nifty50 gainers
items.summary: On Monday, Cipla, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra were among the top-performing stocks within the Nifty50 index, contributing to the broader market's gains.

items.headline: Aegis Logistics, Reliance Industries, Mahanagar Gas lead Nifty Oil & Gas index
items.summary: Aegis Logistics, Reliance Industries, and Mahanagar Gas were noted as top gainers within the Nifty Oil & Gas index on Monday.

items.headline: Suven Lifesciences to participate in BIO International Convention
items.summary: Suven Lifesciences announced its participation in the upcoming BIO International Convention, a significant event for the biotechnology industry.

items.headline: Analysts identify Trent, Eicher Motors, Union Bank, Mankind Pharma as top stock picks
items.summary: Market analysts have highlighted Trent, Eicher Motors, Union Bank of India, and Mankind Pharma as top stock picks for Monday, June 22.

streetRecommendations.name: State Bank of India
streetRecommendations.brokerage: Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk
streetRecommendations.rationale: Recommended as a buy with a potential 25% upside.

streetRecommendations.name: Bharat Electronics
streetRecommendations.brokerage: Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk
streetRecommendations.rationale: Recommended as a buy with a potential 21% upside.

streetRecommendations.name: Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Limited
streetRecommendations.rationale: Recommended due to a breakout from a range consolidation pattern.
